text:
ANUGIL VELAYUDHAN


[ˈanuɡil ˈʋeːlaːjud̪ʱan]


Language Analyst | Phonetics | Phonology


 Kerala, India


   






നമസ്കാരം! I am a Language Analyst at the Language Technology and Data Science Lab at the  International Centre for Free and Open Source Software (ICFOSS) , Kerala, India. I am currently engaged in the Discourse-Integrated Dravidian Language to Dravidian Machine Translation Project (DL-Disco MT), which is part of the Bhashini initiative developed by the Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY), Government of India. My role involves developing phonological, morphological, and syntactic rules for large-scale Malayalam data preparation, including clause boundary detection, anaphora resolution, and discourse connectives, to develop computational models for Dravidian languages.
